'''rothathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:voiceable|voiceable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voiceable|voiceable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rothathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothathithi|rothathithi]] || [[word:rothathiji|rothathiji]] || [[word:rothathishi|rothathishi]] || [[word:rothathiki|rothathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothathuthuthu|rothathuthuthu]] || [[word:rothathujuju|rothathujuju]] || [[word:rothathushushu|rothathushushu]] || [[word:rothathukuku|rothathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothathuthu|rothathuthu]] || [[word:rothathuju|rothathuju]] || [[word:rothathushu|rothathushu]] || [[word:rothathuku|rothathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothathufthuf|rothathufthuf]] || [[word:rothathufjuf|rothathufjuf]] || [[word:rothathufshuf|rothathufshuf]] || [[word:rothathufkuf|rothathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothathethe|rothathethe]] || [[word:rothatheje|rothatheje]] || [[word:rothatheshe|rothatheshe]] || [[word:rothatheke|rothatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothathothotho|rothathothotho]] || [[word:rothathojojo|rothathojojo]] || [[word:rothathoshosho|rothathoshosho]] || [[word:rothathokoko|rothathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothathotho|rothathotho]] || [[word:rothathojo|rothathojo]] || [[word:rothathosho|rothathosho]] || [[word:rothathoko|rothathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothathofthof|rothathofthof]] || [[word:rothathofjof|rothathofjof]] || [[word:rothathofshof|rothathofshof]] || [[word:rothathofkof|rothathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfthĂŻf|rothathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfjĂŻf|rothathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfshĂŻf|rothathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfkĂŻf|rothathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|rothathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|rothathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|rothathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|rothathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfthĂŻf|rothathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfjĂŻf|rothathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfshĂŻf|rothathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfkĂŻf|rothathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfthĂŻf|rothathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfjĂŻf|rothathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfshĂŻf|rothathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rothathĂŻfkĂŻf|rothathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rothathĂŠthĂŠ|rothathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rothathĂŠjĂŠ|rothathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rothathĂŠshĂŠ|rothathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rothathĂŠkĂŠ|rothathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rothathathatha|rothathathatha]] || [[word:rothathajaja|rothathajaja]] || [[word:rothathashasha|rothathashasha]] || [[word:rothathakaka|rothathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rothathatha|rothathatha]] || [[word:rothathaja|rothathaja]] || [[word:rothathasha|rothathasha]] || [[word:rothathaka|rothathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rothathafthaf|rothathafthaf]] || [[word:rothathafjaf|rothathafjaf]] || [[word:rothathafshaf|rothathafshaf]] || [[word:rothathafkaf|rothathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rothathasha|rothathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rothathshĂ«sha|rothathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rothathrosha|rothathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rothathmusha|rothathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rothathyasha|rothathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorothathnkshĂ«sha|gorothathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorothathnkrosha|gorothathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorothathnkmusha|gorothathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorothathnkyasha|gorothathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rothathathasha|rothathathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rothathathshĂ«sha|rothathathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rothathathrosha|rothathathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rothathathmusha|rothathathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rothathathyasha|rothathathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorothathathnkshĂ«sha|gorothathathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorothathathnkrosha|gorothathathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorothathathnkmusha|gorothathathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorothathathnkyasha|gorothathathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:rethĂŠthasha|rethĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rethĂŠthshĂ«sha|rethĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rethĂŠthrosha|rethĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rethĂŠthmusha|rethĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rethĂŠthyasha|rethĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorethĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gorethĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorethĂŠthnkrosha|gorethĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorethĂŠthnkmusha|gorethĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorethĂŠthnkyasha|gorethĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rothfathasha|rothfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rothfathshĂ«sha|rothfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rothfathrosha|rothfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rothfathmusha|rothfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rothfathyasha|rothfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorothfathnkshĂ«sha|gorothfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorothfathnkrosha|gorothfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorothfathnkmusha|gorothfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorothfathnkyasha|gorothfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
